name: giftcard4sale
description: GiftCard4Sale.com - sell gift cards for USDT, Naira or Cedi.

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run prisma:generate -w @gc4s/api && concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:shared && npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
